name: Sam and Max: This Time It's Virtual!

reviews.review_title: FUNNY, CHAOTIC AND FULL OF CHARM
reviews.review_description:
Sam & Max: This Time It’s Virtual! perfectly captures the crazy humor and energy of the original characters.
The VR interactions are fun, the dialogue is hilarious, and the variety of mini-games keeps the experience entertaining from start to finish.
A very enjoyable VR comedy adventure for fans of quirky games and cartoon universes. Hidden Gem!

When I saw this game on sale I thought that it looked really good. I. Was. WRONG!  This game is not fun, unfair and glitchy. I fell through the floor twice during the training mini games, and Sam and max would always walk into me  which took away from the experience. Also at many points in the game you have to stay still being unable to move just having to constantly listen to there endless yapping. But the WORST bit of the game was the grocery store section. The level is just SO CONFUSING! They say that you need to throw things into the demons mouth but they don’t tell you what things your supposed to throw in, and even if you know trying to get it into the demons mouth is So Annoying. I couldn’t even beat the game cause it was so . This game is an utter failure. Please for your own sanity, DO NOT PLAY THIS GAME !!!!!!!!!!! >:( This gets 1 star, but I would rate it lower uf if I could.

reviews.review_title: I love this game so much
reviews.review_description: This is a five star because it is so much of a whack attack of crime and fun that you really feel like you’re inside the movie no joke just spend the money it cost to buy this and it’s gonna be very good

I haven’t actually beaten the game yet, but I already love it. The graphics are so fun, and the world is so well built; it really does make me feel like I’m in Loony Tunes. Highly recommend for anybody who’s looking for a funny puzzle game! 

One thing however…. just recently, I got out of the hospital after my appendix ruptured and I got surgery. I got this game as soon as I felt well enough to play it, since it was on sale. In the tutorial, Max says something along the lines of “Now let’s see if you can get through this without your appendix spontaneously exploding!” I just sat there in awe. Because wow Max, calling me Lumpy is one thing but genuinely breaking the fourth wall to tease me about my near death experience? Respect man, respect. This, my friends, is why I have convinced myself that Max is actually working with the government to collect our personal data and boost the viewership in general, not only of this game but of the oth-
*my voice trails off as I’m dragged into the insane asylum*

Anyways…overall this is an amazing game, and I love the atmosphere. The dynamic between the player and the characters is just perfect. I have experienced a couple of glitches, but nothing serious. However, I do know that I’ve almost beaten it, and is arguable that the price seems a little high for the amount of play time, but it’s a such a good game, so that opinion could definitely vary from person to person. Highly recommend!

reviews.review_title: Cute and Fun, I loved being in a cartoon
reviews.review_description: The graphics are amazing. I loved being in a cartoon. The controls were good. I loved the amusement park games and the Complete story. I'm mostly into survival and escape room types of games so I ignored this for a while. I thought about getting it a few times, but $30 was a little too much to take a chance on. It just went on sale for $15 and I thought, what the heck! It would have been worth the $29.99. I played it from start to finish with only one bathroom break. I'll probably go back through to try and bring up my grades. Overall it's a 5 star game.
The story is great there is no glitches lot of fun things to do funny stuff references to the old show of Sam and max like in the office you can max space mask and fun mini games
I launched onto the game but when I changed some of the settings I couldn’t start the game, is it because I’m on meta quest 3s, or is it a bug? FIX YOUR GAME

Despite a lot of reviews of glitches and not running right, I thought Id try it was on sale, and so far so good. Its running pretty smoothly, with only a couple minor control glitches that I got past pretty easily. Other than that, it runs well.

Its basically a collection of mini games, with a little bit of story worked in. I would have liked it to have a bit more story, but I am enjoying it. The witty banter between Sam & Max is pretty funny as well. 

Id recommend it.
I bought this game a while ago, beat it multiple time, and I always have a good time playing each and every time. Get it NOW🗣️‼️

reviews.review_title: I wanna love this game but....
reviews.review_description: I wanna love this game but even on quest 3, it freezes and I can't interact with anything

reviews.review_title: So much potential, but almost unplayable
reviews.review_description: My sons and I have played almost every Sam and Max game, so we were looking forward to their VR outing. We read the reviews of glitchs, but thought we would roll the dice during the next sale. Unfortunately, we came up craps. The camera consistently spins, we encounters several game breaking scenarios, and other game mechanics just do not register. I wouldn’t think the activity of “waving your hand” would take five minutes before registering. If we could get a refund, we would, and that depresses me with Sam and Max. They deserve better.

reviews.review_title: Fans of point and click growing up.
reviews.review_description:
I grew up playing point and click games and especially Sam and Max. 

So teaming up with Sam and Max in the VR world. It's like the closest Roger rabbit moment you're going to get. The puzzles on certain occasions could use a bit of tweak here and there. But I did enjoy the ending final battle moments felt like a movie. 

Anyways in conclusion, Not a bad game but not for everybody. This game requires patience and little bit of detective skills.
This game is unplayable!!! Every time I load it it’s a black screen, I tried for a literal hour! It’s glitchy, buggy, and crashes so much for me!

developer_response.body: Hi, sorry to hear you are experiencing issues. We have had 1000s play the game without issue so there must be some odd conflict happening. Please contact our support at info@happygiant.com and we will be happy to troubleshoot with you.

reviews.review_description: It's ok but I'd rather have a crouch mode button or reachable arm that you could pick up objects without having to bend over if in the seating mode while in pain to stand or walk. I rather have sitting mode but it needs a crouch button to pick up objects on the ground please.
This game is VERY unplayable. Game ONLY loads then is left blank in the “blue” space. Then, if it actually loads the hands appear but glitch and  don’t move at all. I don’t recommend at all.

developer_response.body: Hi, sorry to hear you are having issues. Please contact us at info@happygiant.com and we will be happy to help.

reviews.review_description:
I've always loved Sam & Max and the style of games they were... This is just a bunch of samey mini-games with the odd boss "battle" thrown in. It's a far cry from the point & click comedy detective series with the occasional mini game it used to be. There's no puzzle solving, no obtuse brain teasing... It's just a clumsy cash-in on a beloved series.
The gameplay is alright and the graphics really fit the established style. 
The "smooth turn" is agonisingly slow, but the rest of the controls seem to be ok.
It's ok. It's playable but nothing particularly exciting or thought-provoking. I was really hoping for something akin to Retropolis or I expect you to die, a decent narrative experience with a fun story... This is just not what Sam & Max games were... It's quite disappointing.

This game is positively UNPLAYABLE. It black screens CONSTANTLY. That in itself could be forgivable however, I can't get past the 1st chapter because when I climb up the pipe it won't let me on to the roof. The only place that lets me teleport to is the alley on the other side which you can't get out of onto the sidewalk to walk around, or climb out of. The only way to get out is to restart and then it puts you at the beginning of the chapter again. Rinse and repeat 5 times of this crap.

I can't play standing and there IS a "sitting" option in settings so, which leads me to believe you should be able to play seated so what gives? Is that the problem, that I'm sitting? If so, there should be a disclaimer that the game can only be played standing and I wouldn't have purchased it. 

Any ideas or solutions would be helpful. This is beyond frustrating.

Trust me, I was extremely exited to play this game and it was the biggest waste of money I have ever spent! When it said adult humour I thought I was going to find this funny… ITS NOT! Trust me from fellow oculus player to other oculus player, don’t buy this!

I used to play Sam n Max on the PC years ago and this new VR version is fantastic!! My 8 year old loves it too. Really fun mini games and tasks. Let’s hope they do a Day of the Tentacle or Monkey Island VR game soon!

reviews.review_title: C o m e d y
reviews.review_description: 5 out of 5, this game makes me crack up, I love the puzzles and things u do so I recommend this game, even if u don’t know Sam and Max
Whenever I am around Max all I think about is how much he is a huggable rabbity thing and I want to snuggle him! :3
everything feels TERRIBLE. climbing especially. HOW DO YOU FU** UP CLIMBING THIS BAD!?

I've been playing Sam & Max games since the original, and adventure games since Adventure was commercialised as Zork. One of the reasons for the death of adventure games in the late 90s/early 2000s was the cheap use of mini games in place of actual complicated puzzles.

Sam & Max VR revives that dreadful genre. After a rather fun intro level, you go through painful mini game after mini game, hoping beyond hope that this is the last one and you'll get to a real wacky adventure with the dog and bunny. It just never happens.

I'm sorry fellow Sam & Max fans, but this isn't the game you hope it is.

I love Sam & Max, one of the reasons I bought the Oculus was too play S&M.
But the game has many bugs that make the game unusable: I had to restart some missions because the game was stuck and I had to kill the app. And you can't even skip the dialogs!

I was so happy to see this game available but I have not been able to get past the techno punk scene on the roof due to multiple bugs, I’ve tried sitting, standing, replaying the whole thing again and again. 
In my mind I just got robed of 30 $
Endless blackouts when you touch walls problems when climbing and so many other bugs.  To bad I spent to much time to make it work and now I can’t get refunded.
This is a good game for people who are completely new to vr I give it a 5/5

reviews.review_title: I've waited a long time for a sequel...
reviews.review_description:
Like many, I'm a massive fan of the SCUMM games and pretty much anything under the LucasArts adventure games umbrella and would love nothing more than to see more titles revived into VR sequels.

However, despite the game using the Sam & Max franchise to pull in the hardcore fan base, the game itself is very short compared to anything you may have played from this kind of genre.

It briefly touches upon a few puzzles using objects in the game but sadly lacks the feeling that you've really gotten anything for your money.

It's sad that developers think a few hours of game play is enough to justify this kind of price tag.

Ok, game dev if your reading this make sure to at least the last part.

First things first dont expect this game to be a telltale game. And yes the game is sometimes buggy but it's not as bad as I thought. And the puzzles and obstacles courses are extremley fun! But it's even more fun when your dumb because my dumb head was overthinking in the get a clue puzzle (kind of ironic)  (SPOILERS RIGHT NEXT TO THIS)  

Are you ok with this? Alright, here we go.


IT TOOKE ME 20 MINUTES to realize theres another door with clues and I just needed to look at first letter on each word on the fridge. So the lesson of story is? Dont overthink in the puzzles.


(This is the last part) But overall with a little tweaking this game could be more comfortable to play with less bugs and I wish there was more to the story! More action and adventures, maybe it could be the next idea! But mainly the bugs are the problem.

10/10 best cartoon style game I have ever played because your not just clicking for clues you are actually a member of the freelance police and you are hitting your hand in the microwave but anyway this is a great game in all
Cool.
This game is amazing game plays fun humor is good tons of replayability 10/10

I always love being around Sam and Max and hearing their banter. I've played since Hit the Road came out. I'm really glad the game developers still see potential and have fun with the characters. 

This game was a fun experience and I'm really glad I got it. It's exactly what I imagined a Sam and Max virtual reality game would be.

I've loved the Sam & Max games franchise already. And the VR game is the best one.
They created a complete 3D and immersive cartoon world, with details and a lot of interaction. You must explore many environments, train your skills to be hired and face challenges across the story.
The best part is that this game is actually many mini games together, including baseball, darts, target shooting and much more. All in a actual storyline that keep you playing to advance.
I'm totally addicted to this game, playing over and over to get better grades on the tests. Recommend to everyone, all ages (but be awarded that has lot of acid talks).
This game is funny and good I love it

reviews.review_title: Designed for Sam and Max fans
reviews.review_description: The game is great! Traditional Sam and Max humor and cases but now with more mini games! It has a very good "hit the road" feel with you working on small things that are technically building up to the big case, but don't over hang so you can replay it easily. The environment is well designed so you can hang out and get lost in the maddness, my favorite part of any play through was before doing anything, i always had the urge to practice my aim on the dartboard. Also there is a glitch that if you run at the clown you can stand ontop of the clown and that just tickles me pink. The only sad part is that none of the prior friends of previous games make an appearance, but the new people are chill, so thats cool. Highly recommend if you enjoyed any Sam and Max property.
The game WOW a puzzle and action game i mean I have never seen a vr game This good

reviews.review_title: Won’t start but I’m sure it’s great
reviews.review_description: Ok so my game won’t start but I’ve seen gameplay and this seems fun,if anyone can help me that would be good,im always stuck at the car scene so do I wait or something else?
Perfect perfect perfect I love this game I love this game it’s so fun fun fun fun fun fun
My Favorite Show as a Kid

I love this game so much it’s frustrating, fun, exiting, storyline is great and has some awesome characters!! 8/10 though because I have to say it can be confusing at times (which is part of the fun) and because the characters never stop talking 👏

developer_response.body: Thanks and glad you enjoyed the fun and pain! (:
